task:
please review all DTOs and fix this bug " Backend had a gap: The AssetResponse DTO (used by GET /api/assets) included cloudAccountId but not cloudInstanceId, even though both exist on the Asset entity. This is a common pattern in evolving codebases — fields get added to the entity
  but the DTO isn't always updated to expose all of them." if existing
